/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Werror -Wno-error=switch -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-result -Wno-maybe-uninitialized -Wno-error=format-truncation -Wno-error=deprecated-declarations -Wno-error=maybe-uninitialized -Wno-error=stringop-overflow -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Wsuggest-override -Wshadow -march=native -mtune=generic -march=native -mtune=generic -O3 -DNDEBUG -fno-trapping-math -fno-math-errno -DBUILD_TYPE_RELEASE CMakeFiles/asn1_rrc_nr_test.dir/asn1_rrc_nr_test.cpp.o -o asn1_rrc_nr_test   -L/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libyaml-cpp.so  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libyaml-cpp.so ../../../lib/asn1/libasn1_utils.a ../../../lib/support/libsrsran_support.a ../../../lib/asn1/rrc_nr/librrc_nr_asn1.a -lgtest -lgtest_main ../../../lib/asn1/libasn1_utils.a ../../../lib/support/libsrsran_support.a ../../../lib/support/network/libsrsran_network.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libyaml-cpp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libdw.so ../../../lib/srslog/libsrslog.a ../../../external/fmt/libfmt.a ../../../lib/asn1/rrc_nr/librrc_nr_special.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -loqs
